creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
Hi folks,

the Maven Ant Tasks have been retired recently [1] because they were unmaintained for years. Users are encouraged to use Maven directly.

Please deprecate or remove the port with a pointer to Maven 3.3.x.

[1] http://www.mail-archive.com/announce@maven.apache.org/msg00746.html

PS: I am a PMC member of the Apache Maven team and a happy FreeBSD user
